query:
SELECT folder AS "folder!: String"
                FROM (
                    SELECT DISTINCT
                        substr(
                            substr(relative_path, ?4 + 1),
                            1,
                            instr(substr(relative_path, ?4 + 1), '/') - 1
                        ) AS folder
                    FROM file_state
                    WHERE source_id = ?1
                      AND relative_path >= ?2 AND relative_path < ?3
                      AND instr(substr(relative_path, ?4 + 1), '/') > 0
                )
                ORDER BY folder ASC
                LIMIT ?5
